ksa_text: Knowledge of data classification, cataloging, and metadata management systems, including automated data discovery, business glossary integration, metadata standards, and the role of metadata in enabling governance and self-service consumption.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-K-014 (Data Architecture/Knowledge) scores 0.494 composite (highest: NIST AI RMF at 0.494). Scope is edge_case for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Data Architecture, composite 0.494. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Architecture for SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Architecture appears in ~40% of SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer postings as secondary competency. Clinical data architecture, audit trails, and eCRF structures relevant for submissions. Zero role-specific signals insufficient for edge-case inclusion at 40% market penetration.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Data Architecture without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
